title: Sodium Optimized
description: A lightweight yet powerful modpack focused on performance, stability, and smooth gameplay.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4288e5d0a7150d9bdec0d40d44c1960e98e9ce57.png)

🌍 Overview

A lightweight Fabric modpack built for players who demand maximum performance and stability without losing the vanilla Minecraft feel.
It’s engineered for precise optimization — improving frame rates, reducing memory usage, and keeping the game visually clean and consistent.

Whether you’re running on a low-end laptop or a high-end desktop, this pack ensures smooth gameplay, quick world loading, and no visual clutter, all while staying faithful to the original Minecraft experience.

🚀 Key Features
⚡ Performance-Focused

Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore for massive FPS boosts and reduced lag.
Starlight replaces Minecraft’s light engine for lightning-fast lighting updates.
Indium ensures full compatibility with Sodium-based rendering.
Dynamic FPS and EntityCulling save resources intelligently when idle.
Immediately Fast optimizes GUI and menu rendering for snappier response.

🎨 Subtle Visual Enhancements

Iris Shaders adds seamless shader support with no major FPS hit.
Continuity brings connected textures and emissive lighting.
Optional lightweight shaders (e.g. Complementary Lite, YoFPS) pre-tested for stability.
Retains a clean vanilla aesthetic — no intrusive visual overhauls.

🧰 Compatibility

Minecraft Version: 1.21.1
Mod Loader: Fabric
Fabric API included
Compatible with resource packs, datapacks, and OptiFine-style shaders
